US FTC demands better policing of 'Made in USA' claims, sends warning letters (Reuters) -The U.S. Federal Trade Commission on Tuesday called on Amazon.com and Walmart to crack down on third-party sellers that make deceptive "Made in USA" claims on the retailing giants' online marketplaces. In letters to Amazon and Walmart, the FTC said it had learned of several instances where third-party sellers falsely claimed their products were made in the United States. The FTC urged both companies to take "corrective action" against sellers whose "Made in USA" claims violate federal law and Amazon's and Walmart's codes of conduct.
